readme_html:
Awesome LLM OS

An LLM OS is an operating system that utilizes large language models to interact with users in natural language, providing intuitive and intelligent assistance. This list compiles resources to help understand, develop, and explore the possibilities of LLM OS. The objective is to create a well-organized, community-driven repository of current, top-quality resources. This initiative aims to enhance practices within the LLM OS and related domains.

This is a curated list of awesome resources, tools, frameworks, papers, projects and discussions related to the concept of Large Language Model Operating Systems (LLM OS). Explore the future of human-computer interaction with natural language interfaces powered by advanced AI.

I highly recommend that you take the time to watch Andrej Karpathy's presentation on LLM OS.

Table of Contents

  • Research Papers
  • Articles and Blog Posts
  • Development Interfaces
  • Videos and Talks
  • Projects and Implementations
  • Communities and Discussions
  • MCP Servers
  • Models, Development Tools and Frameworks
  • Performance and Optimization
  • Security
  • Deployment
  • Contributing
  • License

Research Papers

  • AIOS: LLM Agent Operating System
  • MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems
  • CogVLM2: Visual Language Models for Image and Video Understanding
  • WebWalker: Benchmarking LLMs in Web Traversal
  • Lightweight Neural App Control
  • OS-Copilot: Towards Generalist Computer Agents with Self-Improvement
  • Agent S: An Open Agentic Framework that Uses Computers Like a Human
  • OpenWebVoyager: Building Multimodal Web Agents via Iterative Real-World Exploration, Feedback and Optimization

Articles and Blog Posts

  • Illustrated LLM-OS
  • Goodbye Windows, Hello LLMs: The Future of Operating Systems
  • GPT-4o
  • The Rise of the LLM OS: From AIOS to MemGPT and beyond
  • What would an LLM OS look like?
  • LLMs Are An Essential Kernel Process Of A New Operating System
  • Gemini Powers tldraw's "Natural Language Computing" Experience
  • ScreenAI: A visual language model for UI and visually-situated language understanding
  • Pioneering Automated GUI Interaction with Native Agents
  • Introducing Operator
  • Antrophic - Computer use (beta)

Development Interfaces

  • tldraw computer
  • Pig: Operate Windows Apps With AI

Videos and Talks

  • Intro to Large Language Models - Andrej Karpathy
  • Build the LLM OS Autonomous LLMs as the new Operating System - Phidata
  • Agent OS: LLM OS Micro Architecture for Composable, Reusable AI Agents - IndyDevDan
  • OS-World: Improving LLM Agent Operating Systems!
  • LLM OS with gpt-4o - Phidata
  • LLM OS on AWS - Ashpreet Bedi

Projects and Implementations

  • Letta (formerly MemGPT)
  • AIOS
  • Phidata - Serving LLM OS on AWS
  • Examples and Shares about tldraw computer
  • Self-Operating Computer Framework
  • GCA: GPT Computer Assistant
  • UI-TARS Desktop: A GUI Agent application for controling computer using natural language.
  • Magnitude: Open source AI agents for web testing
  • BLAST: Browser-LLM Auto-Scaling Technology
  • Open Computer Use
  • Open Interpreter
  • memU: 24/7 Always-On Proactive Memory for AI Agents

Communities and Discussions

  • LLM Agent Operating System - Rutgers University 2024 - AIOS
  • Karpathy's LLM OS, what are your thoughts?

MCP Servers

  • Desktop Commander MCP

Models, Development Tools and Frameworks

  • OmniParser: A general screen parsing tool, which interprets/converts UI screenshot to structured format, to improve existing LLM based UI agent

Performance and Optimization

Security

Deployment

Contributing

Contributions are more than welcome! 🌟

We highly encourage and appreciate contributions from the community. Whether it's new resources, improvements, or suggestions, your input helps make this list better. Please read the contribution guidelines before making a pull request.

License
